allow: PowerShell($port = 3012; $pids = \(netstat -ano 2>$null | Select-String ":$port\\s"\) | ForEach-Object { \($_.Line.Trim\(\) -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id \([int]$p\) -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output "Cleared port $port")
